{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323144945D9130CC3E13F71FFEB70"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7604178042446250814","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看爱看多写多更"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770490529,"group_id":"7599988304099953726","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"广江男士举世无双，广江男士威武雄壮！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9MT4ayIQ8NQrd+B3ExpcNzshwB3s9Fj/ZQ6LYzHSJ2x","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1f1a7acda25f4ef7af978946628100dc~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788746&x-signature=9tKBB8mofxOidSTLZ68Vr554Ivk%3D","user_id":"1426483818799976","user_name":"飞天大广江"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1426483818799976","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.2","title_id":"author_level_2"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.2","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7599988304099953726","book_info":{"abstract":"【高武】+【杀伐果断】+【男女主双强势】+【末世】+【轻松】+【‘搞笑’】+【‘健康阳光积极向上’】+【异能】
在这个沸腾的世界，苍穹被雷电撕裂，大地遭焚城烈焰舔舐。
有人身披合金重甲踏碎山峦，有人指尖轻划便让空间坍缩成深渊。
更不乏顶著兽耳的战士——当他们瞳孔泛起野性金光，毛茸茸的拳头能轰穿装甲堡垒，而稀有者怒吼时竟喷吐著冰霜龙息！
可当检测光柱笼罩我时，异变发生了。
仪器先是尖叫著炸裂半边外壳，剩余屏幕疯狂滚动乱码，最终在刺耳警报中迸出两道熔岩般的血字：【SS】！ 
全场导师瘫跪在地，颤抖的手指著我嘶吼：“你的兽魂呢？元素共鸣呢？！”
我低头看向掌心。
皮肤下突起的不是鳞甲也非利爪，而是疯狂搏动的自身血管。锁骨在噼啪声中诡异隆起，伤口渗出的血珠竟在半空凝成我的脸孔轮廓。
当沸腾的血液悬浮在天空中，我终于懂了——
这具躯体才是终极兵器。
“都看好了...”我的声音震颤这引发空间涟漪：
“老子的异能——”
“就是觉醒我自己啊！！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oc0dcea0a0a22a5e5d928add918058947~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"飞天大广江","author_id":"","book_id":"7599988304099953726","book_name":"异能高武：我竟觉醒我自己？！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#380000","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7599989536495518270","read_count":"690","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"116955"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"52","tags":"都市高武,都市,都市异能,穿越,系统","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oc0dcea0a0a22a5e5d928add918058947~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779432585&x-signature=hb3qSW%2FYka9RaRZUyzdklyWGt%2F8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1426483818799976","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"10"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323144945D9130CC3E13F71FFEB70"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":1,"author_digg_time":1770490898,"i
